case_title: SF HOUSING AUTHORITY vs. GODLOCK, ARLENE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT GODLOCK, ARLENE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOUSING AUTHORITY OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, A PUBLIC CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GODLOCK, ARLENE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1514 SUNNYDALE AVENUE, S.F.
